prompt: Simple centered icon asset, bold silhouette, minimal detail, high contrast, readable at small sizes. A single polished mobile app shortcut icon for a Chinese teacher management tool named Term Report. Centered front-facing compact report booklet with a softly folded page corner and one bold white star-award symbol on the cover. Friendly minimal 2.5D soft-plastic style matching modern Chinese education apps. Smooth lilac to petal-pink gradient, tiny warm coral highlight, very soft ambient shadow, crisp clean edges, generous white padding, pure flat white background with no texture, readable at 48 pixels, no surrounding app-icon tile, no text. Avoid: letters, Chinese characters, numbers, watermark, logo, white rounded-square container, enclosing tile, photorealism, complex checklist, thin lines, dark colors, blue-dominant palette, green, heavy shadow, isometric angle, side view, multiple icons, gray background, gradient background.
